story.text:
# 📓 Term Nodes

95 `term` nodes in the spellweb knowledge graph.

## Nodes

- [[2D Fortress]] — ECC in 2D space. One keyhole. Shor finds it.
- [[2D lock shatters]] — 2D lock shatters / elliptic curve broken
- [[62-Lap Theorem]] — 620 transitions drop R < 1. Dragon tier density.
- [[6D Manifold]] — Six dimensions. No keyhole. Only a path to walk.
- [[6D manifold cannot be 2D-attacked]] — 6D manifold cannot be 2D-attacked / dimensional immunity
- [[Aperture]] — Aperture / agent governance
- [[At-Rest Attack]] — Crack dormant wallets. 1.7M BTC frozen in time.
- [[Audrey Tang]] — Taiwan's digital minister. vTaiwan, Polis, digital democracy pioneer.
- [[Behavioral Density ρ]] — Privacy through presence. The person too present to reduce.
- [[Bilateral Exchange]] — The trust triad. Site speaks MyTerms. Triangle forms.
- [[blade action]] — blade action / cutting / slashing
- [[Blade Tiers]] — Light (strata 0-2), Heavy (3-4), Dragon (5-6)
- [[Connection is not separation]] — Connection is not separation
- [[constellation nodes]] — constellation nodes / spell accumulation
- [[Constellation Wave]] — Intelligence flowing through infrastructure along the geodesic.
- [[Control plane]] — Control plane / coordination / direction
- [[Control plane ⊥ data plane separation]] — Control plane ⊥ data plane separation
- [[Coordination ⊥ content]] — Coordination ⊥ content
- [[Corpus callosum]] — Corpus callosum / bridge that divides
- [[Data plane]] — Data plane / payload / force
- [[David Chaum]] — Blind signatures (1983). DigiCash. The father of digital privacy.
- [[derivation chain]] — derivation chain / blade sequence / forging path
- [[DOM-free]] — DOM-free / measurement-dark / no layout reflow
- [[Dragon]] — Dragon / cosmic perspective / edges
- [[Dragon Anatomy]] — Boundary, Hide, Brain, Forge, Ceremony. Five parts assembled.
- [[Dragon flight (term)]] — Dragon flight / quantum wind / the architecture takes flight
- [[Drake]] — Drake / intimate perspective / centre
- [[Drake emergence → Dragon transformation]] — Drake emergence → Dragon transformation / conditions given form then proven thro
- [[Drake\'s teaching manifest in the mesh]] — Drake\'s teaching manifest in the mesh
- [[Dual Convergence]] — Orbs within 60px, amber burst. The first crossing.
- [[edge]] — edge / morphism / promise
- [[edge primacy]] — edge primacy
- [[Emissary]] — Emissary / narrow focus / analysis / parts
- [[Emissary Dispersion]] — Emissary Dispersion / the analytical blade as swarm of servants
- [[Emoji Cast]] — The fastest ceremony. Emoji becomes cursor.
- [[Encrypted tunnels]] — Encrypted tunnels / individual node armour
- [[Five Crossings]] — The five ways the swords cross: Dual Convergence, Hexagram Cast, Emoji Cast, Con
- [[Glen Weyl]] — Plurality architect. RadicalxChange. Quadratic mechanisms.
- [[Hemispheric balance]] — Hemispheric balance
- [[Hemispheric separation]] — Hemispheric separation / divided brain
- [[hexagram]] — hexagram / 64 I Ching states / privacy posture vector
- [[Hexagram Cast]] — Six lines between orbs. 64 states for 64 postures.
- [[holographic boundary]] — holographic boundary / 96 edges encoding 64 vertices / boundary computation
- [[inscription flows to spellweb]] — inscription flows to spellweb / mana spent on graph
- [[lattice measurement]] — lattice measurement / pretext arithmetic
- [[lattice vertex]] — lattice vertex / blade configuration / hexagonal compute cell
- [[mage]] — mage / spell / delegation / projection
- [[Mage as left hemisphere]] — Mage as left hemisphere / the Emissary
- [[MagicDNS]] — MagicDNS / sovereign naming
- [[Mana Economy (term)]] — Earned through practice, spent on inscriptions. Never purchased.
- [[manifold]] — manifold / lattice structure
- [[manifold-tetrahedron-ship]] — manifold-tetrahedron-ship
- [[Master]] — Master / broad attention / context / whole
- [[Measurement Dark]] — Page alive but invisible to fingerprinting. DOM never triggered.
- [[mirror, share, bind]] — mirror, share, bind
- [[NAT traversal]] — NAT traversal / Mage projection through network boundaries
- [[neg(bnot(x)) = succ(x)]] — Negate the complement and advance. The privacy primitive in UOR algebra.
- [[On-Setup Attack]] — Crack admin key once, exploit forever. The attack that keeps giving.
- [[On-Spend Attack]] — Intercept transaction, crack key, re-sign before settlement.
- [[Pascal Triangle Distribution]] — Stratum population: 1, 6, 15, 20, 15, 6, 1 vertices across 7 strata
- [[path]] — path / trajectory
- [[Path Gate]] — Extensions earned through training. The blade goes first.
- [[path integral computed on boundary]] — path integral computed on boundary / the equation rewards the dance
- [[Pretext]] — DOM-free text measurement. One touch, then memory, then mathematics, then silenc
- [[quantum threshold]] — quantum threshold / 1200 logical qubits suffice
- [[Right→left→right]] — Right→left→right / the return cycle
- [[same blade infinite forgings]] — same blade infinite forgings / zero knowledge property
- [[Satoshi Nakamoto]] — Bitcoin (2008). Solved double-spend with Proof of Work. Identity unknown.
- [[secret language]] — secret language / internal cipher
- [[Seventh Capital Reclaimed]] — Time stealing entropy back from the surveillance economy.
- [[shield]] — shield / armor / protection
- [[spell casting]] — spell casting / delegation / projection
- [[spell casting onto page]] — spell casting onto page / inscription
- [[swordsman]] — swordsman / blade / privacy / boundary-making
- [[Swordsman and Mage meet]] — Swordsman and Mage meet / dual-orb convergence
- [[Swordsman as right hemisphere]] — Swordsman as right hemisphere / the Master
- [[tetrahedral separation matrix]] — tetrahedral separation matrix
- [[the Dragon]] — the Dragon / cosmic perspective / all possible space / speaks from the edges
- [[The Dragon\'s Hide]] — The Dragon\'s Hide / mesh as overlapping scales
- [[the Drake (term)]] — the Drake / intimate perspective / personal path / whispers from the centre
- [[the Keeper]] — the Keeper / guardian of the Infinite Vault
- [[the mathematician Platox]] — the mathematician Platox / paradox teacher
- [[The mesh itself]] — The mesh itself / overlapping protection
- [[the strike identity]] — the strike identity / deny-the-complement advance / privacy primitive
- [[The Tailnet]] — The Tailnet / sovereign mesh
- [[triune activation]] — triune activation
- [[triune graph spell]] — triune graph spell
- [[Two modes of attention]] — Two modes of attention
- [[Understanding-as-key (term)]] — Understanding-as-key / comprehension proof / bilateral knowledge
- [[Understanding-as-Key (term-understanding-as-key)]] — Comprehension as basis for trust. The post-quantum primitive.
- [[Universe Blade]] — 62 laps, Dragon tier, Blade 63, 乾. The forest itself.
- [[Usurpation pattern → prevented by bound]] — Usurpation pattern → prevented by bound
- [[V5.1]] — Behavioral density, hexagram encoding, bilateral witness. The forge's correction
- [[verified personhood]] — verified personhood / First Person / root of trust
- [[Vitalik Buterin]] — Ethereum founder. From money to computation. The programmable blockchain.
